overall.description: Spider-Man (Miles Morales) swings through a snow-covered Manhattan during golden hour, transitioning from high-rise skyscrapers to waterfront docks and back to city streets in this gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man: Miles Morales.

events.description: character releases web and freefalls briefly before shooting new web line
descending from highest altitude toward narrower building corridors

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man swings at high altitude between skyscrapers using web lines, performing acrobatic flips

entered.detail: Tall modern glass and steel skyscraper with vertical lines dominating the skyline
Building rooftop covered in white snow
City skyline visible in the background against the sunset

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man swings high above the city among towering glass skyscrapers during golden hour. The snow-covered rooftops glint in the warm sunlight as the character performs acrobatic maneuvers between buildings at high altitude.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban canyon between high-rise buildings

events.description: enters narrow alley between close-set brick buildings
character lands on rooftop briefly then launches off toward waterfront
exits building canyon, waterfront and harbor become visible

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man descends through narrow building corridors, lands on a rooftop, and leaps toward the harbor

entered.detail: Red brick building with multiple windows and fire escapes
Body of water with docks and industrial structures visible in distance
Classic wooden water tower on building roof

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow urban canyon between brick apartment buildings. Spider-Man lands on a snow-covered rooftop before launching toward the waterfront, with the harbor becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront with shipping docks and cranes

events.description: swinging out over open water of the harbor
character performs aerial flip while swinging around industrial crane
leaving waterfront area, returning toward industrial city buildings

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man swings over the harbor water, navigating around large industrial cranes and dock structures

entered.detail: Large metal dock crane with long arm extending over the water
Low industrial building with snow-covered roof on the pier
Open water reflecting the golden sunset colors
Shipping containers stacked on the dock

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man swings out over the open harbor water, navigating between large industrial cranes and dock warehouses. The water below reflects the warm sunset colors as the character performs acrobatic maneuvers around the dock structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed industrial and residential urban area

events.description: returns to dense urban building cluster from waterfront
lands on snowy rooftop and immediately launches off
swings low over street level, cars and bus visible below

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man returns to the city, swinging between mid-rise buildings and landing briefly on rooftops

notable_agents.action: city bus driving down the street below

entered.detail: Tall factory smokestacks rising above the buildings
Brown brick mid-rise apartment building with fire escapes
Street with traffic and snow on the ground visible below

segments.scene_description: Leaving the waterfront, Spider-Man returns to the urban environment, swinging past industrial buildings with smokestacks. The character lands briefly on a snowy rooftop before continuing, swinging lower over city streets where traffic and pedestrians become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban street with traffic and pedestrians

events.description: swings low between buildings at street level
navigates through traffic, bus and cars visible on street
shoots web upward to gain altitude while moving forward

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man swings at lower altitude through city streets, weaving between traffic and buildings

notable_agents.action: city bus driving down the street below

entered.detail: Red and white public transit bus on the street
Classic urban street lamp post along the sidewalk
White striped pedestrian crossing painted on street

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man swings at street level through the urban canyon, navigating between buildings above traffic. A city bus and other vehicles move along the snow-dusted streets below while pedestrians walk on the sidewalks, and the character shoots webs upward to maintain momentum.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Spider-Man swings from the heights of glass skyscrapers down to the bustling activity of snow-covered city streets. It begins high above the city during golden hour, with the camera tracking acrobatic maneuvers among glinting rooftops before diving into a narrow urban canyon of brick apartment buildings. As the character launches toward the horizon, the scene opens up to the open harbor, where the camera glides over reflecting waters and industrial cranes. The movement then shifts back toward the urban core, passing industrial smokestacks and snowy rooftops before descending further toward the ground. Finally, the perspective settles at street level, weaving through the urban canyon above moving buses and pedestrians on snow-dusted sidewalks.
